conversations.content: Let's do some magic exercises in the world of Azeroth to test your application of the new rules.

Please explain using the special rule of the Azeroth world mentioned the day before yesterday: As an Arcane specialization mage, if I want to use "Time Rift", what is the core effect after casting? What scenarios is it most suitable for?
<function>memory_query_call</function><content>The special rule of the Azeroth world mentioned the day before yesterday, core effect and applicable scenarios of the arcane magic "Time Rift"</content>

Related memory fragment: [mem-id:25] Time: 2025-01-12-12:19, Content: The user taught the casting rules for the arcane magic "Time Rift" in Azeroth. The prerequisites are the Mage class (Arcane specialization), Revered reputation with the Violet Eye, and possessing the "Eternal Hourglass" as a casting medium; the core effect is tearing open a time rift at the target location, slowing the time flow of all hostile units within the area by 30% for 8 seconds, and dealing periodic arcane damage; applicable to controlling large waves of mobs and interrupting boss key skills. Low relevance memory fragment: None.

conversations.think: The memory mentions 1 related entry, [mem-id:25] gives the detailed casting rules for "Time Rift". Information needs to be extracted from three dimensions: 1. Prerequisites: Mage class (Arcane specialization), Exalted reputation with the Violet Eye, possessing the "Eternal Hourglass" as a casting medium; 2. Core effect: tears open a time rift at the target location, slowing the time flow of all hostile units in the area by 30% for 8 seconds, and dealing periodic arcane damage; 3. Applicable scenarios: controlling large waves of mobs, interrupting boss key skill scenarios.
conversations.content: The core effect of casting "Time Rift" is to tear open a time rift at the target location, slowing the time flow of all hostile units in the area by 30% for 8 seconds, and dealing periodic arcane damage. This spell is most suitable for controlling large waves of mobs and interrupting boss key skill scenarios.
Correct! You have mastered this new rule.
